control_name: Risk analysis process documented and performed
Risk management actions tracked to completion
Security awareness and training program maintained
Security incident procedures documented and tested
Contingency plan and restore testing documented

Device and media disposal controls documented

Audit controls and log review procedures implemented
Integrity controls protect ePHI from improper alteration
